title: astragalus crenatus
intro: Astragalus crenatus, also known as the crested milkvetch, is a perennial legume native to China and other parts of Asia, characterized by its unique crested seed pods. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus crenatus include enhanced immune function, reduced fatigue, and improved cardiovascular health. Astragalus crenatus can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to create a tonic for overall well-being.
